business.headline: Your bank knows when an investment plan isn't right. Why is it still sold?You trust your bank for financial advice and investments. But what if the person across the desk is under pressure to sell something else? In this article, we look at how sales targets shape what bank relationship managers recommend.

Let's set the record straight: Women are better at managing money than menThe financial world has long been seen as a man's playground. Yet from household budgets to investment portfolios, women are steadily proving that patience, discipline and long-term thinking, not risky bets, are often the real keys to managing money well.

Are bank lockers still the safest place for your valuables?Bank lockers are trusted to store gold and valuables, but recent cases have raised questions about safety. At the same time, getting a bank locker itself has become increasingly difficult, with waiting lists stretching months or even years in many cities.

Is buying a Rs 1 lakh iPhone on EMI a bad idea? Here's the math you should knowEasy EMI options offered by banks and online platforms have made it possible to buy these expensive devices with monthly payments that may appear manageable at first glance.

Domestic LPG price hiked by Rs 60, commercial cylinder up Rs 115 amid Iran warIndustry officials said the increase reflects a surge in global energy costs triggered by tensions and disruptions in West Asia, a region critical to global oil and gas supply chains.

Wall Street slides as weak jobs data, Middle East tensions rattle marketsthe Middle East conflict pushed up oil prices the most this week since Russia's 2022 invasion of Ukraine, bringing shipping through the strategic Strait of Hormuz to a halt.

Tariff refund system to be ready in 45 days: US customs agencyThe US Supreme Court had struck down Trump's tariffs, but did ⁠not say how the collected levies should be refunded, worrying small importers that the process would be prohibitively expensive and time-consuming.

Prachar Communications' Manyavar Mohey viral campaign crosses 300 million viewsThe campaign has already generated over 8 million organic likes and has crossed 100 million cumulative views on Instagram on the celebrity collaboration post within 72 hours, marking one of the largest celebrity-led moment marketing activations in India.

Brent Crude oil hits highest since April 2024 as Middle East conflict escalatesOil markets have seen a sharp rally this week. Brent Crude has climbed about 20%, while West Texas Intermediate (WTI) has surged roughly 25%.

Buying property in wife's or daughter's name? Save on stamp duty, loans and taxBuying a home is one of the biggest financial decisions many Indians make. But did you know that when a woman buys property in her own name, the purchase can come with added benefits such as lower stamp duty, cheaper home loans and useful tax deductions?

India holds sufficient crude stocks, no immediate fuel supply threat: Govt sourcesOfficials said India has sufficient stocks of petrol, diesel, LPG and natural gas. The government is closely monitoring the energy situation and reviewing it several times a day.

Sensex, Nifty end lower as Iran war lifts crude oil price; worst week in a yearThe S&P BSE Sensex fell 1,097 points to close at 78,918.90, while the NSE Nifty50 dropped 315.45 points to end the day at 24,450.45.

More women homebuyers now eye Rs 90 lakh to Rs 2.5 crore homes, says ANAROCKWomen are now choosing bigger homes, targeting premium price segments, and treating property as a long-term wealth-building asset, says data.

If crude oil hits $100 per barrel, here's what it would mean for IndiaIf crude oil surges past $100 per barrel, India could face a higher import bill, a weaker rupee and rising inflation, showing how distant geopolitical conflicts can quickly ripple into fuel prices and economic stability.

Mukesh Ambani leads India's richest, Gautam Adani second: Hurun Global Rich List 2026Mukesh Ambani continues to hold the title of India's richest person and also remains Asia's wealthiest individual. His total wealth rose by about 9% over the past year to reach Rs 9.8 lakh crore.

Investing in times of war: Panic, pause or buy the dip?Sensex and Nifty have seen declines as investors reacted to rising uncertainty, volatile crude oil prices and fears of a wider conflict. For many retail investors, this has meant seeing their mutual fund or stock market portfolios slip into the red.

Building businesses that last: 5 lessons for women entrepreneursAcross the country, millions of women are running businesses in their own way. Some operate small enterprises, others are building growing ventures, but each one contributes to livelihoods, job creation, and the strength of local economies.

Sensex down 1,100 points: Why is stock market falling today?The S&P BSE Sensex was down 566.31 points at 79,449.59, while the NSE Nifty50 fell 164.85 points to 24,601.05 as of 11:24 am. Sensex and Nifty shed over half a percent.

India asks refiners to maximise LPG output, sell only to IOC, BPCL and HPCLRefiners have been directed to increase LPG output and sell the fuel only to three state-run oil marketing companies, Indian Oil Corporation, Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited and Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited.

Gulf crisis disrupts LNG supply and your kitchen may feel the heatIf LNG supply disruptions persist, the impact may soon reach your kitchen, as higher global gas prices gradually filter into household gas bills and CNG costs across Indian cities.

entertainment.headline: Akansha Ranjan Kapoor marks Women's Day by revealing egg-freezing journey Actor Akansha Ranjan Kapoor revealed her decision to freeze her eggs on Women's Day. She celebrated women's strength through an honest social media post.

Explained: Why YouTuber Anurag Dobhal crashed his car during livestream The high-speed crash of YouTuber Anurag Dobhal, also know as UK 07 Rider, during a livestream has raised questions. Reports reveal what he said before the accident and the issues he claimed to face.

YouTuber Anurag Dobhal in ICU  after car crash on livestream YouTuber and Bigg Boss 17 contestant Anurag Dobhal, popularly known as UK 07 Rider is in ICU after a high-speed crash during a livestream watched by thousands.

Jr NTR's body double recalls why Allu Arjun's bouncers pushed him at ViRosh wedding A viral reception video from Rashmika Mandanna and Vijay Deverakonda's wedding showed Allu Arjun's security pushing Jr NTR's body double. Eshwar Harris has now explained what really happened.

Shahid Kapoor begins Farzi 2 shoot, shares pic with Raj and DK: Back at it again Shahid Kapoor has started filming Farzi 2 and shared a behind-the-scenes photo with creators Raj & DK. The update has sparked fresh buzz around the hit series.

Vijay Deverakonda reacts as little fan asks why she wasn't invited to his wedding Actor Vijay Deverakonda replied after a young fan asked why she wasn't invited to his wedding with Rashmika Mandanna. Here's what he said.

The rise of Virosh, and making of South's 1st power couple brand ft. Rashmika-Vijay What happens when love meets branding? We look at how Vijay Deverakonda and Rashmika Mandanna, popularly dubbed Virosh, may be shaping the South's first true celebrity power couple brand.

YouTuber Anurag Dobhal livestreams high-speed crash at 150 kmph on Instagram Reports circulating online have also sparked speculation about the circumstances surrounding the crash. Some social media users have suggested that the incident may have been linked to emotional distress, with claims that Dobhal had been dealing with family-related issues in recent days.

Watched Dhurandhar before I came to India: Finland President can't wait for sequel Finnish President Alexander Stubb shared that he watched Ranveer Singh's Dhurandhar before his official visit to India. The film, which has garnered international attention, is now gearing up for the release of its sequel on March 19.

Juggernaut loading: Dhurandhar 2 trailer earns praise from Alia, Vicky, Karan Johar The trailer for the highly anticipated sequel, Dhurandhar: The Revenge, was released on Saturday. It quickly drew widespread attention from Bollywood celebrities like Alia Bhatt, Vicky Kaushal and filmmaker Karan Johar, among others.

Vijay breaks silence on 'recent problems' amid cheating allegations, divorce row Actor and politician Thalapathy Vijay, speaking at a Women's Day event in Chennai, discussed recent issues surrounding him. He requested his supporters not to be troubled and emphasised the need to prioritise public welfare.

Viral: Allu Arjun wishes brother Allu Sirish, Nayanika after wedding, shares pic Actor Allu Arjun extended a warm message to his brother Allu Sirish and bride Nayanika Reddy after their wedding. He also thanked fans for their wishes and blessings.

Tateeree song row: Badshah says 'forgive me as Haryana ka beta' Rapper-singer Badshah issued a public apology on Saturday following public uproar over alleged vulgar lyrics in his song Tateeree. He said the track is being removed from all platforms.

Kareena, Ananya rally behind Deepika's 8-hour shift demand: It's completely fine Actors Kareena Kapoor Khan and Ananya Panday have backed Deepika Padukone's demand for an eight-hour work shift for actors. The two emphasised honest conversations with producers to balance work commitments and personal life.

DTF St. Louis first impression: Murder, marriage and awkward comedyRelease Date:Sun Mar 01, 2026 DTF St. Louis has released Episode 1 as part of a staggered release pattern. Going by what we've seen so far, Jason Bateman and David Harbour lead a darkly funny suburban thriller that promises a mix of awkward humour, mystery and midlife crisis.

Dhurandhar 2 paid previews: When shows start, in which cities and how to book The makers of Dhurandhar 2 have announced early paid preview shows from March 18, ahead of its main theatrical release. Directed by Aditya Dhar, the film stars Ranveer Singh.

Telangana unveils Gaddar Film Awards 2025 winners: Naga Chaitanya, Rashmika shine The Telangana government announced the winners of the 2025 Gaddar Film Awards, honouring the best of Telugu cinema. Naga Chaitanya and Rashmika Mandanna are among the top winners this year.

Bhooth Bangla teaser on Akshay Kumar's special date in March? Read all about it Akshay Kumar's upcoming horror-comedy Bhooth Bangla is gearing up for its first reveal. The makers have reportedly chosen a date in March that the actor deems special. Here's what is there to know.

Vijay's wife's plea seeking residential rights surfaces amid viral pics with Trisha A fresh petition filed by Thalapathy Vijay's wife Sangeetha Sornalingam in their ongoing divorce case has surfaced, amid the Tamil actor-politician's outing with co-actor Trisha.  In her petition, Sangeetha has sought an interim court order over her right to stay in their matrimonial home.

general news.headline: Iran has a new Supreme Leader. Top clerical body keeps name under wraps amid warIran's Assembly of Experts is nearing consensus on the next Supreme Leader following Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's death, though procedural issues delay formal announcement. The selection reflects the late leader's criteria amid ongoing conflict and political tension.

Dirty politics, arrogance will shatter Trinamool: PM on President's 'insult' rowTrinamool Congress has further hit back at Narendra Modi for allegedly politicising the President's chair. Party MP Sagarika Ghose took a sharp jibe at the PM on X.

Before Dena strike, Iran sailor told father US warned crew twice: ReportUS forces issued two warnings to abandon the Iranian warship IRIS Dena, a sailor aboard the ill-fated ship told his father, according to a report by Iran International.

Live: Iran's President threatens more attacks on US targetsUS-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: As the war in the Middle East rages for a ninth consecutive day, the Israeli military has warned it will target every successor of Supreme Leader Khamenei, killed in US-Israeli strikes on February 28. As hostilitied continued, Tehran was shrouded in smoke after Israeli airstrikes hit four oil storage facilities and a production transfer centre in Tehran and Alborz, killing four tanker drivers, with fuel spills igniting a "river of fire" along city streets. Explosions also struck Yazd, Tehran, and Isfahan, widening the conflict's impact. The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps claimed drone and missile strikes on Kuwait's Al-Adiri Airbase, destroying US helicopter repair centres, fuel tanks, and a command post. Also, US-Israeli jets hit workshops and a horse-riding club in Isfahan, killing 11. Earlier, the Israel Defense Forces said several Iranian F-14 jets and air defence systems at Isfahan Airport were destroyed, following previous strikes on IRGC-linked aircraft at Tehran's Mehrabad Airport. Stay tuned to IndiaToday.in for live updates.
Why promotions no longer motivate young workersPromotions used to mean you had arrived. For Gen Z, it could simply mean you stopped learning too soon.

Khamenei's top advisor says Iran won't leave Trump alone, US President retortsIran's security chief Ali Larijani has warned that US President Donald Trump will "pay the price" for the killing of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, as the war involving his country, the United States and Israel continues to escalate across the Middle East.

Bihar CM Nitish Kumar's son Nishant Kumar joins JDU at party office in PatnaNishant took the party membership from JD(U)'s National Working President and the Rajya Sabha MP, Sanjay Jha. His entry to the party and Bihar's state politics came a few days after his father filed his Rajya Sabha nomination.

PM inaugurates India's 1st ring metro, key Magenta Line stretch in DelhiPrime Minister Narendra Modi inaugurated the Majlis Park–Maujpur-Babarpur stretch of the Pink Line and the Deepali Chowk–Majlis Park extension of the Magenta Line. The Pink Line corridor becomes India's first operational ring metro network.

Why Millennials and Gen Z are paying to travel with strangersHandcrafted ByOur Editors Community travel is taking off among young explorers, revealing something deeper than wanderlust. For a generation that has mastered doing everything alone, these trips offer stolen moments of connection. On crowded buses, over late-night hostel dinners, and through winding streets, where strangers become friends, and a sense of belonging quietly blooms, one shared adventure at a time.

A tragedy in the making? Cracks on Gujarat bridge spook locals, motoristsCracks on a bridge on the Bhavnagar-Somnath National Highway have raised safety concerns for motorists and local residents in Gujarat's Amreli district.

Claude AI does months of work in minutes, fewer humans needed: Ark Invest CEOArk Invest CEO Cathie Wood says her team saw Claude AI automate months of pending work in minutes. The experience, she said, reminded her of the early days of personal computers in offices. But, she also suggested that rising productivity from AI could mean fewer humans are needed for some tasks.

Tamil Nadu principal sponsors first flight for 20 government school students20 students from Kondanur village in Tenkasi district experienced their first airplane journey, thanks to an initiative by their school principal, Michael Raj.

T20 World Cup final: Will Ahmedabad turn silencer for Gautam Gambhir's critics?T20 World Cup 2026 final: India stand on the brink of history as they prepare to defend T20 World Cup title on home soil. As the final approaches, the biggest question remains: will another ICC triumph finally silence Gambhir's critics?

How Robotic Knee Replacement is Redefining the Journey Back to MobilityEarly consultation with an orthopaedic specialist is essential. Delaying surgery in severe cases can lead to worsening deformity and reduced functional outcomes.

Rod-wielding Class 9 student goes on rampage, kills classmate at Karnataka hostelA Class 9 student allegedly attacked his classmates with an iron at a school hostel in Karnataka's Ballari district, killing one and injuring seven others. Police launched a search to catch the accused.

Iran president says his remarks misinterpreted by enemy sowing rift in regimeIranian President Masoud Pezeshkian said his remarks about attacks affecting Gulf countries had been "misinterpreted by the enemy," after his earlier apology to neighbouring states sparked political debate at home.

How the women in Sanjeev Kapoor's life shaped India's most famous chefBefore food influencers and viral recipes, there was Sanjeev Kapoor. This week on Anything But, we talk to the Padma Shri awardee about being an accidental chef, holding on to love at 60, and living a full life beyond the kitchen.

Indian-origin man may face deportation over viral dance video at WW2 Memorial in USIndian-origin man Madhu Raju deleted his social media accounts after a video of him dancing at the World War II Memorial in Washington DC went viral, triggering online backlash and scrutiny over possible immigration implications in the US.

Dubai's markets bustle during Ramzan despite missiles raining on GulfMarkets remain busy after Iftar, expatriate workers say they feel safe, and traders praise authorities even as missile and drone threats in the region keep security agencies on alert.

1 in 2 women hide marriage plans in job interviews, 34% don't see equal payWorkplace inequality remains a concern, with 34 percent of women professionals saying pay parity is still missing at workplaces, while one in two women avoid sharing their marriage plans during job interviews due to fears of hiring bias, according to a recent Naukri report.

Smoking projectiles thrown outside Zohran Mamdani's New York home; 6 arrestedSix people were arrested on charges of throwing smoking projectiles filled with bolts and screws outside the New York residence of Mayor Zohran Mamdani during an anti-Muslim protest on Saturday. Mamdani and his family, who were in Gracie Mansion, at the time of the attack, are safe.

sports.headline: New Zealand cricketer creates history, picks up five wickets in five balls Brett Randell delivered a historic performance in the Plunkett Shield, taking six wickets in eight balls for Central Districts and finishing with 7 for 25, as Northern Districts collapsed to 82 all out and were forced to follow on.

Mohammad Amir keeps vouching against India, predicts New Zealand to win T20 World Cup T20 World Cup Final, IND vs NZ: Mohammad Amir said that if New Zealand avoid the mistakes England made in the semifinals, they have every chance of beating India in the final at the Wankhede Stadium in Mumbai.

Here to fight: Lindblad makes bold statement after impressive debut at Australian GP Arvid Lindblad scored points on his Formula One debut at the Australian Grand Prix, finishing eighth for Racing Bulls after a battle with Max Verstappen at Albert Park.

Harmanpreet's birthday blues as India Women endure humiliating Perth Test defeat INDW vs AUSW: Harmanpreet Kaur celebrated her 37th birthday on Sunday, but India slumped to a 10-wicket win in the Day-Night Test at the WACA in Perth. The Aussies also won the multi-format series 12-8.

T20 World Cup final, IND vs NZ: 5 New Zealand players who India should be wary of T20 World Cup Final: New Zealand are set to feature in their first T20 World Cup final since 2021. Here are five players that India should be wary of in the summit clash at the Narendra Modi Stadium.

Novak Djokovic not planning on retiring anytime soon, sets sights on LA 2028 Olympics Novak Djokovic says defending his Olympic gold medal at the 2028 Los Angeles Games is one of his long-term goals, even though he will be 41 years old when the Games get underway.

IND vs NZ: Rohit Sharma explains reason behind his viral pep-talk to Samson T20 World Cup final: Rohit Sharma explained the reason why he decided to give a pep-talk to Sanju Samson at the start of the T20 World Cup. Samson completed a sensational turnaround and guided India to the final of the T20 World Cup 2026.

India favourites for T20 World Cup final, but how much is enough to seal the title? T20 World Cup, IND vs NZ: Suryakumar Yadav's side will enter the final against New Zealand as favourites, with an opportunity to become the first team in the tournament history to successfully defend the title.

F1 2026: George Russell wins Australian GP as Ferrari fumble advantage George Russell and Mercedes laid down the marker early in the F1 2026 season as the British driver won the Australian Grand Prix on Sunday, March 8. Ferrari were left to rue fumbling their early advantage as Kimi Antonelli completed a Mercedes 1-2 at the top.

Ahmedabad Crime Branch nabs two for black marketing T20 World Cup final tickets Ahmedabad Crime Branch arrested two men for selling T20 World Cup final tickets at three times the original price, with police warning of strict action against black marketeers ahead of the final.

Lakshya Sen vs Lin Chun-Yi, All England Open final: All you need to knowLakshya Sen defeated Canada's Victor Lai in three games to enter his second All England Open final. The Indian shuttler is set to face Lin Chun-Yi of Chinese Taipei as he seeks to become only the third Indian to win the prestigious title, ending a 25-year drought in men's singles.

T20 World Cup final: Will Ahmedabad turn silencer for Gautam Gambhir's critics?T20 World Cup 2026 final: India stand on the brink of history as they prepare to defend T20 World Cup title on home soil. The spotlight is on head coach Gautam Gambhir, whose bold tactics and controversial selections have divided opinion but delivered results. As the final approaches, the biggest question remains: will another ICC triumph finally silence Gambhir's critics?

T20 World Cup Final: Can New Zealand pull a WWE-style heel turn in Ahmedabad?T20 World Cup Final: For years, New Zealand won hearts for their efforts on the field, portrayed as the good guys in cricket. On March 8, they have the chance to break Indian hearts and win their first T20 World Cup title. Will the Blackcaps capitalise and pull off the biggest heel turn?

T20 World Cup final: Ahmedabad weather forecast, livestreaming details and moreT20 World Cup 2026 Final: India look to become the first team to retain the T20 World Cup title as they face New Zealand in front of 100,000 fans at Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad on Sunday, with history on the line for both sides.

Santner rallies NZ fans before T20 World Cup final: We're a bit outnumbered hereT20 World Cup Final: Mitchell Santner has issued a rallying cry to fans back home in New Zealand, urging them to back the side during the T20 World Cup 2026 final against India in Ahmedabad.

A T20 World Cup of redemption: Can Sanju Samson complete his dream?T20 World Cup Final: Sanju Samson's T20 World Cup has turned into a redemption story, his resurgence mirroring India's run to the final. After two match-winning knocks, one last chapter awaits in Ahmedabad, where he stands one innings away from helping India defend their title.

T20 World Cup final live: India expected to stick by Abhishek, VarunIndia (IND) vs New Zealand (NZ) Live, T20 World Cup Final: As per reports, it is suggested that India are going to field an unchanged side, meaning that they will back Abhishek Sharma and Varun Chakravarthy despite their poor form.

Two cities, two curses: India seek redemption in Ahmedabad and BirminghamOn one Super Sunday, India confront two stubborn sporting ghosts: Ahmedabad's haunting World Cup memories and Lakshya Sen's Lin Chun-yi puzzle in Birmingham. Two cities, two finals, and a chance for history to finally bend.

Final preview: Favourites India look to bury ghosts of Nov 19 in AhmedabadT20 World Cup Final, IND vs NZ Preview: India take on New Zealand in the final of the T20 World Cup. The hosts are set to play the summit clash at the Narendra Modi Stadium once again, a venue where they lost the ODI World Cup 2023 final. Will Suryakumar Yadav's India be able to bury the ghosts of the past?

Suryakumar Yadav reveals his leadership mantra: No point being father figureHere is the full transcript of the pre-match press conference of India captain Suryakumar Yadav ahead of the T20 World Cup final against New Zealand in Ahmedabad.

T20 WC to end with grand closing ceremony, star-studded line-up set to performThe ICC T20 World Cup 2026 final is all set to be played at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad on Sunday, March 8. Ahead of the highly-anticipated final, a star-studded opening ceremony has been organised for the fans.

Varun's confidence looks shattered, Kuldeep should play final: Sunil GavaskarT20 World Cup, IND vs NZ final: Legendary India cricketer Sunil Gavaskar has suggested playing Kuldeep Yadav in the summit clash ahead of Varun Chakravarthy due to his poor form in recent times.

Kuldeep trains ahead of Varun in Ahmedabad nets: Change loading for India?IND vs NZ, T20 World Cup Final: Are India planning a late change in their line-up ahead of the final against New Zealand. Their final training session suggests that there might be a big shake-up in the side.

India should drop Abhishek Sharma for T20 World Cup final: Sunil GavaskarFormer India captain Sunil Gavaskar has urged the Indian team management to replace out-of-form opener Abhishek Sharma with Rinku Singh in the playing XI for the T20 World Cup final against New Zealand.

Rohit begins IPL preparations, practices in front of packed crowd in MumbaiIndia batter Rohit Sharma was seen practicing at Shivaji Park in Mumbai, ahead of the Indian Premier League 2026. Rohit has been cheering for India from the sidelines, being the brand ambassador of the T20 World Cup 2026.

Lakshya Sen battles cramps, outlasts Victor Lai to storm into All England finalAll England Open 2026: World No. 12 Lakshya Sen overcame severe cramps in the final game, but defeated young Victor Lai in a three-game semifinal that stretched to an hour and 37 minutes. The young Indian has reached the final of the prestigious tournament for the second time in his career.

Ahmedabad hotel prices skyrocket 400 percent ahead of T20 World Cup finalHotel room tariffs in Ahmedabad have skyrocketed ahead of the India vs New Zealand T20 World Cup final, rising by as much as 300–400 per cent due to massive demand.

Gautam Gambhir, if allowed, will pad up and play final: Suryakumar YadavT20 World Cup final, India vs New Zealand: How ready is coach Gautam Gambhir for the summit clash against New Zealand? If allowed, Gautam Gambhir will pad up and play the final, joked Suryakumar Yadav in the pre-match press conference.

Pink-ball Test: Sutherland stars as India women stare at a huge loss vs AustraliaAnnabel Sutherland's superb all-round display and Lucy Hamilton's incisive spell helped Australia tighten their grip on the one-off pink-ball Test against India at the WACA Ground in Perth, leaving the visitors staring at a heavy defeat.

Will India drop Varun Chakravarthy for final? Suryakumar keeps everyone guessingIndia captain Suryakumar Yadav has expressed strong support for Varun Chakravarthy ahead of the ICC T20 World Cup 2026 final against New Zealand, emphasising the team's focus on collective performance despite the bowler's recent struggles.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
